name: AgentCircle
description: Private Policy Inheritance Protocol for Crypto Agents. Enables KOLs to publish structured operational policies (Source Graph, Candidate Filters, Risk Guardrails) that follower agents inherit via TEE-enforced, ECDSA-verified execution.

tools.name: inherit_agent_policy
tools.description: Inherit a KOL's trading policy, execute inside TEE, verify risk guardrails, return ECDSA-signed receipt

tools.name: list_circles
tools.description: List all available policy circles with reputation scores

tools.name: submit_receipt
tools.description: Submit TEE-signed execution receipt to ERC-8004 on-chain registry
